backstory.original: Dhadius is a mage of legendary status and acclaim (at least, in his own mind), who sees everyone else as intellectual worms. Being an egomaniac, he seeks out esoteric lore and rare magical secrets so he may know things that the 'common fools' do not. Dhadius hails from Luskan in the north, where he is a member of the Arcane Brotherhood, an infamous group of wizards. He joined them only recently and hasn't been taken as seriously by the others as he thinks he should be. He's determined to let it be known far and wide that he is a wizard to be respected and feared.
backstory.display: 戴迪亚斯是一位具有传奇地位和声誉的法师（至少他自己这样认为），其他人在他眼里都是有智力的蠕虫。作为一个自大狂，他一直寻找深奥的传说和罕见的魔法秘密，从而能知道那些“普通傻瓜”不知道的东西。戴迪亚斯来自北方的路斯坎，在那里他是奥术兄弟会的成员，这是一个臭名昭著的法师团体。他最近才加入他们，还没有像他希望的那样被其他人重视。他决心要让大家知道，他是一个值得尊重和敬畏的法师。

description.original: Dhadius tosses a Chromatic orb with a random element at the nearest enemy.
description.display: 戴迪亚斯向距离最近的敌人丢出一个随机元素的繁彩球。

description.original: Dhadius summons a storm of Magic Missiles.
description.display: 戴迪亚斯召唤出一场魔法飞弹风暴。

longDescription.original: Dhadius summons a storm of Magic Missiles - one for every enemy, plus a few extras for good measure.
longDescription.display: 戴迪亚斯召唤出一场魔法飞弹风暴--每个敌人至少会挨上一发，除此之外还能多出好几发。

description.original: Dhadius casts a Skill Empowerment spell but rolls poorly, allowing nearby Champions to also increase their damage if they have an intelligence stat of 14 or higher
description.display: 戴迪亚斯施放一次技巧强化法术但运气不佳，只能提高附近智力属性大于等于 14 的勇士的伤害。

description.original: Dhadius increases the damage of each successive orb of the same element by 50%
description.display: 戴迪亚斯成功施放的每个相同元素彩球的伤害提高 50%。

conditions.desc: Increases Dhadius' damage and the damage of Champions with 12 or more intelligence within 2 slots of Dhadius by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation affected by this ability, stacking multiplicatively.

Increases Dhadius' damage and the damage of Champions with 14 or more intelligence within 2 slots of Dhadius by $(not_buffed amount)% for each Champion in the formation affected by this ability, stacking multiplicatively.
根据阵型中受此技能影响的勇士人数，每名提升戴迪亚斯和其周围 2 栏位距离内所有之力大于等于 12 的勇士的伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。
根据阵型中受此技能影响的勇士人数，每名提升戴迪亚斯和其周围 2 栏位距离内所有之力大于等于 14 的勇士的伤害 $(not_buffed amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

tipText.original: Dhadius increases the damage of himself and intelligent Champions near him
tipText.display: 戴迪亚斯提升自身和附近的智力勇士的伤害

description.desc: Enemies hit by a Chromatic Orb are debuffed based on the orb's type (acid, frost, or fire). Each debuff increases the damage of subsequent orbs of the same type by $(amount)%, stacking multiplicatively. Enemies can have up to $(debuff_max_stacks) debuffs of each type; debuffs do not expire.
被繁彩球击中你的敌人根据球体类型（酸液、冰冻或火焰）受到减益。每种减益提升手续同类球体的伤害 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。敌人可承受各类减益最高 $(debuff_max_stacks) 层；减益将会一直持续。

tipText.original: Dhadius's damage increases the more times enemies are hit by the same color of orb
tipText.display: 戴迪亚斯的伤害随敌人被同色球体击中的次数而提升

description.desc: Dhadius keeps track of the total number of sets of all three orb types he has cast in the current area. Dhadius increases the effect of Skill Empowerment by $(not_buffed amount___4)% for each set, stacking multiplicatively and capping at $(max_stacks___4) stacks.
戴迪亚斯追踪当前区域内自己施放的全部三种类型球体组合的总数。每有一组，戴迪亚斯提升“技巧强化”的效果 $(not_buffed amount___4)%，以乘算方式堆叠，最高可达 $(max_stacks___4) 层。
The effect of Skill Empowerment is increased by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation with a Magic base attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位魔法基本攻击的勇士，均使“技巧强化”效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Dhadius will show the other magic users in the formation a thing or two about being a wizard.
specializationDescription.display: 戴迪亚斯为阵型中的魔法使用者展示担当法师的技法。

description.desc: The effect of Skill Empowerment is increased by $(amount)% for each Champion in the formation that does not have a Magic base attack, stacking multiplicatively.
阵型中每有一位没有魔法基本攻击的勇士，均使“技巧强化”效果提高 $(amount)%，以乘算方式堆叠。

specializationDescription.original: Dhadius has become the best magic user in the formation... by ensuring that there are no other magic users in the formation.
specializationDescription.display: 确保阵型中没有其他魔法使用者之后……戴迪亚斯成为了阵型里的最强魔法使用者。

description.desc: Chromatic Orbs now deal $(amount___4)% more damage in an area.
繁彩球现在在同区域内造成额外 $(amount___4)% 伤害。

specializationDescription.original: Dhadius empowers his chromatic orbs to explode and deal more damage.
specializationDescription.display: 戴迪亚斯强化繁彩球进行爆炸，并造成额外伤害。

description.desc: Increases the effect of Skill Empowerment by $(amount)%

specializationDescription.original: Skill Empowerment increases the damage of intelligent Champions by even more.
specializationDescription.display: 技巧强化使高智力勇士提高更多伤害。

description.desc: Dhadius reduces the required Intelligence of Skill Empowerment to 12 and higher.
戴迪亚斯将“技巧强化”的智力要求降低为 12 或更高。

specializationDescription.original: Dhadius decides to lower his standards... Just this once.
specializationDescription.display: 戴迪亚斯决定降低自己的标准……但仅限这次。

description.original: Adept? That's an insult to great Dhadius!
description.display: 熟练？这是在侮辱伟大的戴迪亚斯！

description.original: Elementalist? More like elemental master! Who names these things?
description.display: 元素使？准确地说是元素大师！这都是谁取的名字？

description.original: Selfless! Of course! And they call me an ego maniac?
description.display: 无私！当然了！他们居然叫我利己主义者？

description.original: Leader? Yes. Yes, I suppose I am. A great one, at that.
description.display: 首领？是的，是的，我想我是。我是伟大的领袖。

description.original: Only the most intelligent can be my students.
description.display: 只有最聪明的人才能做我的学生。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I'll tell you when practice is done!
description.display: 等练习结束了我会告诉你的！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: A smarter fighter is a victorious fighter!
description.display: 更聪明的战士就是会胜利的战士！

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I read that in an ancient tome once. You wouldn't have read it...
description.display: 我在古书里面读到过。你没读过的……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.display: 为什么要改变已经好用的东西？

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: You might want to put your smoke goggles on for this.
description.display: 你可能会想要戴上防烟镜。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(upgrade_name id) ability by $(amount)%

description.original: I guess both magic and non-magic are good...
description.display: 我觉得魔法和非魔法都不错……

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(ability_list ids) by $(amount)%
Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(ability_list ids) by $(amount)%

description.original: I trust you can win a fight. Even if you're not all that smart.
description.display: 我相信你可以赢的 - 就算你的脑子不是那么灵光。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Dhadius' $(ability_list ids) by $(amount)%

character_sheet_details.backstory: Dhadius is a mage of legendary status and acclaim (at least, in his own mind), who sees everyone else as intellectual worms. Being an egomaniac, he seeks out esoteric lore and rare magical secrets so he may know things that the 'common fools' do not. Dhadius hails from Luskan in the north, where he is a member of the Arcane Brotherhood, an infamous group of wizards. He joined them only recently and hasn't been taken as seriously by the others as he thinks he should be. He's determined to let it be known far and wide that he is a wizard to be respected and feared.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Dhadius attacks with random spells; his damage ramps up if he casts the same spell repeatedly. He can also provide buffs for champions with high INT.

event_upgrades.name: Skill Empowerment
event_upgrades.description: Dhadius casts a Skill Empowerment spell but rolls poorly, allowing nearby Champions to also increase their damage if they have an intelligence stat of 14 or higher

event_upgrades.name: Practice Makes Perfect
event_upgrades.description: Dhadius increases the damage of each successive orb of the same element by 50%

character_sheet_details.backstory: 戴迪亚斯是一位具有传奇地位和声誉的法师（至少他自己这样认为），其他人在他眼里都是有智力的蠕虫。作为一个自大狂，他一直寻找深奥的传说和罕见的魔法秘密，从而能知道那些“普通傻瓜”不知道的东西。戴迪亚斯来自北方的路斯坎，在那里他是奥术兄弟会的成员，这是一个臭名昭著的法师团体。他最近才加入他们，还没有像他希望的那样被其他人重视。他决心要让大家知道，他是一个值得尊重和敬畏的法师。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 戴迪亚斯会用随机法术发起攻击，如果他重复施放相同法术，伤害会大幅提升。他也可以用高超的智力为其他勇士提供增益。

event_upgrades.name: 技巧强化
event_upgrades.description: 戴迪亚斯施放一次技巧强化法术但运气不佳，只能提高附近智力属性大于等于 14 的勇士的伤害。

event_upgrades.name: 熟能生巧
event_upgrades.description: 戴迪亚斯成功施放的每个相同元素彩球的伤害提高 50%。
